deploy.startCommand: python -m cosine_viability.main --postgres-url "$DATABASE_URL" --phase 0 --bucket "${BUCKET:-typical_power}" --output-dir /tmp/benchmark-results --image-label "$IMAGE_LABEL" --tier-label "$TIER_LABEL" --region-label "$REGION_LABEL" --storage-backing "$STORAGE_BACKING" && sleep 3 && echo '===HANDOFF_MARKDOWN_BEGIN===' && cat /tmp/benchmark-results/phase0-handoff-*.md && echo '===HANDOFF_MARKDOWN_END===' && echo '===EXPLAIN_STEP0_BEGIN===' && cat /tmp/benchmark-results/explain/phase0/*/step0.txt && echo '===EXPLAIN_STEP0_END==='
